summary: Experienced technology operator with a track record across IT operations, business systems, infrastructure modernization, automation, stakeholder management, and cross-functional delivery. Replace this with your factual baseline summary before using the sweep.

experience.title: Technology Operations Lead
bullets: Led cross-functional technology operations initiatives across infrastructure, endpoint, SaaS, and support workflows.
Built automations and process improvements that reduced manual work and improved delivery reliability.
Partnered with stakeholders across business, finance, security, and operations to ship practical systems improvements.
